notes: Franchisor equity claim with specific referents (Alex Hormozi, 30% equity, nine-figure exits). Named speaker and conditions anchor the claim; falsifiable via network verification.
Authenticity vs imitation claim. Clear speaker attribution, mechanism provided (structural advantage of authentic expression). Load-bearing on strategy choice.
Offer value architecture (speed/ease/guarantee). Named speaker, comprehensive conditions, mechanism tied to buyer scarcity. Testable via price comparison across attribute combinations.
B2C education AI disruption risk. Named speaker, specific domain (lower-stakes advice), mechanism implied (limited harm = lower urgency for AI avoidance).
Profit-share pool allocation (two-thirds future reserve). Named speaker, quantified axis (ratio of future to current allocation), mechanism (talent timing), conditions specified.
Geographic monopoly strategy (50% to 70-80% share). Named speaker, quantified axis anchors, mechanism (competitor starvation), conditions bounded.
Microgym profitability math. Named speaker, fully quantified axis (member count, revenue, expenses, take-home), mechanism (margin insufficiency). All calculations verifiable.
Consultative sales permission-asking step. Named speaker, multiple conditions (sales call type, product complexity), mechanism (autonomy signal primes receptivity).
Earn-back mechanism structure (activation + advertising actions). Named speaker, conditions specified (money-back guarantee context), mechanism tied to dual outcome production.
Telehealth paid acquisition as transition gate. Named speaker, specific context (menopausal women, national), mechanism (compounding risk), conditions bounded.
Difficulty curve / opportunity jumping. Named speaker, mechanism clearly structured (four-stage arc restart), conditions specify lived vs retrospective. High n_sources (6).
Brand moat via credibility/teaching gap. Named speaker and entity (Acquisition.com), mechanism (inverse correlation of credibility and teaching willingness), domain-specific condition.
Biz-op equity worthlessness. Named speaker, mechanism (legal gray area prevents institutional sale), conditions bounded (does not apply to legitimate franchises).
